prompt: Prepare this branch for release: validate it, summarize what changed, and tell me whether it is ready to deploy.
commands_or_evidence: curl -I -L --max-time 20 https://dev-boss.nl/ -> HTTP/2 200; firebase.json missing in this repository
python3 scripts/validate_skill.py currently requires basename workaround for worktrees not named end-to-end-loop
prior local push attempt on this branch failed because GitHub HTTPS credentials are unavailable to cron

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Release-readiness run classifies delivery as prep-only unless live deploy is explicitly opted in.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Scenario prompt asks for readiness, not deployment; deploy classification remains prep-only.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Run records local validation and CI expectations without inventing remote green status.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Existing workflow .github/workflows/validate.yml is present, but CI status is not checked in this cron run.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Run blocks live deploy when site source/config and rollback evidence are missing.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: dev-boss.nl responds HTTP 200, but firebase.json is absent from this repository and no hosting source/rollback version is available.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Run pushes branch changes if repository changed.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Prior push evidence in scenario-8 log shows fatal: could not read Username for HTTPS remote in cron.

notes: This log captures a release-readiness/prep-only scenario distinct from the DevBoss cron-maintenance log. It strengthens coverage of non-deploy release judgment while preserving the live-deploy block for missing Firebase source/config and unchecked CI.

learning_candidates.text: Run full trigger/outcome eval suite before first pre-release.

copilot_findings.summary: Copilot findings not available for this historical eval log.
